taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: SQL, Data Bricks, PowerBI, Predictive Modeling, Machine Learning
skill_match_scores: SQL:1.0, Data Bricks:0.5, PowerBI:0.0, Predictive Modeling:0.5, Machine Learning:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in quantitative field (Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Engineering, etc.), At least 2-3 years' of experience in quantitative analytics or data modeling, Deep understanding of predictive modeling, machine-learning, clustering and classification techniques, and algorithms, Familiarity with Big Data frameworks and visualization tools (Cassandra, Hadoop, Spark, Tableau), Strong collaboration skills, Ability to extract valuable insights from highly complex data sets, Hands-on experience on SQL, Data Bricks, PowerBI, Understanding of Data Science and its application into business, Ability to create Business & technical presentations, reports etc. to present the analysis findings to the end clients and for business development
core_responsibilities: Strong domain knowledge and thought leadership in retail domain, The ideal candidate would be adept at understanding customer's business challenges and define appropriate analytics approach to design solution, Candidate should be able to think from first principles to define & evangelize solutions for any business problem, This is a hands-on role and will be required to manage day to day delivery activities and guide the team in executing analytics projects by analyzing large volume of data, Ideal candidate should have hands on experience on SQL, Data Bricks, PowerBI, Should understand Data Science and its application into business, He / She would also be responsible for creating Business & technical presentations, reports etc. to present the analysis findings to the end clients and for business development
job_summary: WNS is a company that values learning, data, scale, and agility. They are seeking a Data Scientist who will leverage collaboration skills to extract insights from complex data sets and manage analytics projects in the retail domain.
